MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Robert Im Esq., Ghidotti Perger LLP, 949-427-2010, via zoom for plaintiff
Thomas Lalanne Esq., Law offices Thomas Lalanne, 415-434-1122, via zoom for defendant

Mr. Im contests the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TEMPLE VIEW CAPITAL FUNDING, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES is DENIED. Triable issue of material fact exists as to the calculation of deficiency balance. Plaintiff's Evidentiary Objections are SUSTAINED notwithstanding Plaintiff's untimely filing of the Amended Declaration of Justin Wenk, the Amended Memorandum of Points and Authorities in support of Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment, or, in the alternative, Summary Adjudication, and the Amended Separate Statement of Undisputed Material Facts.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-08-2024 Continued To Mar-15-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Robert Im; 949-427-2010; Ghidotti Berger LLP appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not contested. Discussed. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TEMPLE VIEW CAPITAL FUNDING, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES is continued to March 15, 2024. Opposing party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and department 302 minute order to deliver a courtesy copy of the opposition no later than February 26, 2024. The Court received the courtesy copy of the opposition on March 7, 2024, the day before the scheduled hearing, with a cover letter dated March 5, 2024.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF TEMPLE VIEW CAPITAL FUNDING, LP's Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues is adopted as follows:

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on March 8, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases arising from the acquisition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Both parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than February 26, 2024.
